name: Legacy Pro & V2 Glass Bubbler + Silicone Adapter
summary: The AirVape Legacy Pro & V2 glass bubbler adds compact water filtration for smoother, cleaner sessions.
description: The AirVape Legacy Pro & V2 glass bubbler adds compact water filtration for smoother, cleaner sessions. Designed for a secure fit with an included silicone adapter. Its portable design keeps your setup lightweight while enhancing performance. Ideal for both home use and on-the-go sessions. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
